text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Do you two have your things?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm perfect. And full of respect and sincerity!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm full of deep feelings of admiration!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: To the kind person we owe so much to!

text_block_list.name: All Three
text_block_list.text: We have the deepest gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I sure hope King will like this teacup I made...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I used too much force and crushed quite a few
earlier attempts. But I was finally able to finish it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Of course she'll like it! Just hearing about how
hard you worked shows that you made it with
love!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But looking at my gift... Maybe a keychain is a
little too childish for a grown-up like Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You searched far and wide to get your hands on
that keychain! It even has a mini version of her
car.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But I guess I'm kind of nervous too. Tachyon is
really talented, so maybe this aromatherapy set is
a little plain...

text_block_list.name: All Three
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm so anxious!
Oh, this is nerve-racking!
Oh, my heart's racing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, that's what we've been called here for... I feel
a sudden urge to depart.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Maybe we've arrived too early?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ Oh, they're just so adorable!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But it's strange. I feel this kind of close
connection with Chiyo. And not just when we
run... It's like I can't take my eyes off her.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I understand that feeling. Whenever I'm with
Kawakami, it's like I lose all sense. I can't help but
look after her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm... On that thought, perhaps what you're
describing could be feelings of affinity? I believe I
have had similar experiences.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, let's keep what we just heard
between us. If they find out we were here, I bet
their little knees would buckle!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're right... Pretending not to notice would be
the first-rate thing to do.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
While I would like to measure their heart rates
upon telling them they were overheard... I'll have
to save that experiment for another day.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they're here! Together, on the count of three.
One, two...

text_block_list.name: All Three
text_block_list.text: Thank you for being there for me!
